name: GolfIN Team
about: GolfIN Team is an indoor golf training facility specializing in data-driven instruction using TrackMan technology. The venue offers a range of programs including private lessons, group coaching, and club fitting services. It caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to advanced players, with a focus on using precise swing data to improve performance. The facility emphasizes a professional learning environment with PGA-certified instructors and provides both TrackMan-enabled practice and traditional golf lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TrackMan technology provides precise swing data for real improvement
Small group lessons with a 4-1 coach-to-junior ratio
Official TaylorMade dealer with waived fitting fees and discounts
Family-oriented environment with junior programs available

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary technology used for lessons and practice sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or they have right-handed clubs available for use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: TrackMan tournaments (simulated rounds) are 60 minutes in duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer junior programs with a 4-1 coach-to-junior ratio and family-oriented services.
